name: HelpCrunch Customer Communication Platform API
what_it_does: All-in-one customer communication platform with REST API — combining live chat, email marketing, a knowledge base, and chatbot automation in a single platform with conversation management, in-app messaging, proactive chat triggers, auto messages, and customer data profiles for SaaS companies.
use_cases: Managing customer conversations across live chat and email via HelpCrunch API
Querying chat analytics and support metrics for customer success reporting
Integrating conversation data with CRM for customer profile enrichment
Automating proactive chat triggers based on user behavior events
Pulling knowledge base article performance for content optimization
not_for: Enterprise customer service with complex routing (use Zendesk or Freshdesk)
High-volume email marketing automation (use Klaviyo or ActiveCampaign for scale)
Developer documentation (use GitBook or ReadMe for technical docs)
best_when: A SaaS company wants an affordable all-in-one platform combining live chat, targeted email automation, knowledge base, and chatbot without managing separate tools for each channel.
avoid_when: You need enterprise-grade support with complex routing, high-volume email marketing at scale, or need specialized point solutions for each channel.

auth.notes: API key from HelpCrunch account settings. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. Mobile and web SDKs for chat widget integration. Webhook for conversation and email events. No OAuth2. Zapier integration for workflow automation.

pricing.paid_tiers: Basic $12/team member/month; Pro $20/team member/month; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Ukrainian company (Kyiv). Founded 2016. Bootstrapped. All-in-one differentiator at low price — live chat + email + KB + chatbot in one platform. Affordable pricing vs Intercom. Intercom replacement positioning. Auto messages for user onboarding. Custom chatbot builder. Strong in SMB SaaS companies globally. Resilient operations despite geopolitical context.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for customers, conversations, chats, and emails. Bearer token auth. Good documentation. Mobile SDKs for chat widget. Webhook for all communication events. Auto message creation via API. Chat widget requires SDK installation on website/app.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Conversation reads idempotent. Customer reads idempotent. Email reads idempotent. New conversation creation not idempotent — check existing open conversations before creating.
known_agent_gotchas: Chat widget requires JavaScript or mobile SDK on website/app
Auto messages targeting requires user property/event data via SDK
Ukrainian company — verify data residency requirements for EU data privacy
All-in-one pricing is per seat — cost scales with team size
GDPR: chat conversation data is user PII — implement retention policies

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. EU data residency. Bearer token auth. Customer conversation data is PII — GDPR retention policies required. Ukrainian company — verify geopolitical risk tolerance for sensitive customer data. Chat widget access requires careful CSP configuration.
